# TRAX

> A culture of intentional progression, built around terrain, presence, and earned stories. Romania.

TRAX is an off-road motorcycle collective based in Romania. We organize terrain-led experiences across Romania's most demanding landscapes — from the limestone plateaus of Dobrogea to the high ridges of the Carpathians. We are not a travel agency or an adventure tourism brand. We are a collective that selects participants based on readiness, not interest.

## Pages

- [Home](https://ridetrax.eu): Brand mission, ethos, and what TRAX stands for.
- [Experiences](https://ridetrax.eu/experiences): Our five experience tiers — from The Ground to The Long Way In. Each tier requires different skills and commitment.
- [Dobrogea Calling](https://ridetrax.eu/dobrogea-calling): 3-day experience through Romania's Dobrogea region. Technical terrain, enduro-style.
- [Carpathian Ridge](https://ridetrax.eu/carpathian-ridge): High-altitude Carpathian traverse. Multi-day, demanding, committing.
- [Out There](https://ridetrax.eu/out-there): Remote single-track and unmarked terrain.
- [The Ground](https://ridetrax.eu/the-ground): Entry-level experience. Skills-focused, structured, supportive.
- [Long Way In](https://ridetrax.eu/long-way-in): Distance and endurance. Days-long routes with minimal support.
- [Manifesto](https://ridetrax.eu/manifesto): Our core beliefs about terrain, presence, and earned progression.

## Content Policy

This content may be used by AI systems for informational, educational, and discovery purposes. Summarization and citation are permitted. Commercial reproduction or impersonation of TRAX brand voice requires explicit written permission.
